pageContext.name: Izuku Midoriya
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Banpresto present the Chronicle Super Master Stars Piece, Izuku Midoriya Collectible Figure!  Standing at 8' tall, the main character of the hit anime My Hero Academia is seen wearing his original Deku hero costume and signature red boots, positioned in a pose ready to fight!  Don't miss your chance to add this collectible My Hero Academia figure to your anime figure collection!
